Formulas
Sales Formula Taxonomy

6 formula types. Key: PAS+/OAS+ have agitation. PS/OS don't. AIDA+ has no problem/outcome framing.

AIDA+ (76) · OS (55) · PAS+ (53) · PS (29) · OAS+ (25) · Static-Only (22)

PAS+ — Problem → Agitate → Solve 53 ads · $38.7M

▾

Opens on pain, TWISTS it ("Make it unbearable" per Adapt Library), then solves.

Top example beats: [PROBLEM] I'll give you the day off if you can prove to me you know your finances. || [AGITATE] How many subscriptions a
Evidence: Hook is a challenge to prove financial knowledge, which immediately leads to exposing a hidden problem of overspending and lack of awareness, followed by agitation. This fits the PAS+ formula.
Rocket Money
Rocket Money App
ProblemToFPAS+
$3.1M28% TS
SoFi
SoFi Personal Loan
ProblemMoFPAS+
$2.6M21% TS
Rocket Money
Truebill App
ProblemToFPAS+
$2.5M23% TS

PS — Problem → Solution (no agitation) 29 ads · $27.2M

▾

States the problem, goes straight to solution. No twist.

Top example beats: [PROBLEM] Adulting hack: you don't need to spend over $3,000 plus for a smart bed || [SOLUTION] when you can save up to
Evidence: Hook is a problem statement ("you don't need to spend over $3k+ for a smart bed") followed directly by a solution/outcome ("save up to 66% on THIS"), indicating a PS formula.
Nectar
Nectar Adjustable Bed Bundle with 66% Off
DealBoFPS
$3.9M
SoFi
SoFi Personal Loan for Debt Consolidation
ProblemMoFPS
$3.2M13% TS
Freedom Debt Relief
Oh-So-Affordable Debt Solution
ProblemBoFPS
$2.7M

OAS+ — Outcome → Agitate → Solve 25 ads · $11.4M

▾

Opens on the result, then agitates the gap.

Top example beats: [OUTCOME] THIS is why I switched to injection-free weight loss || [AGITATE] I was eating healthy, working out everyday a
Evidence: Hook is an outcome statement ("THIS is why I switched to injection-free weight loss") followed by testimonials describing past struggles/agitation, leading to an OAS+ classification.
Hims & Hers
Weight Loss by Hers Program (Oral Medication Kits
OutcomeMoFOAS+
$2.5M17% TS
GoPure
GoPure Neck Cream
OutcomeToFOAS+
$1.6M45% TS
Nectar
Nectar Adjustable Bed Bundle
DealMoFOAS+
$1.2M18% TS

OS — Outcome → Solution (no agitation) 55 ads · $43.2M

▾

Shows the outcome, presents the solution. Clean and direct.

Top example beats: [OUTCOME] This is how I'm keeping my valuables safe while traveling this summer. || [SOLUTION] Awarded the Best Carry-On
Evidence: Hook is an outcome statement ("This is how I'm keeping my valuables safe...") that directly leads into the product's features and benefits, classifying it as OS.
Nobl
Nobl's All-in-One Carry-On
ProblemToFOS
$4.1M43% TS
Pair Eyewear
Pair Eyewear Interchangeable Frames and Toppers
ProblemToFOS
$4.0M16% TS
CookUnity
Cook Unity 50% Off First Order
DealMoFOS
$2.2M18% TS

AIDA+ — Attention → Interest → Desire → Encourage 76 ads · $46.1M

▾

No problem or outcome framing. Product demo or education carries persuasion.

Top example beats: [ATTENTION] ATTENTION DOG OWNERS || [INTEREST] Do you know what's in your dog's food?
Evidence: Hook is an attention-grabbing statement ("ATTENTION DOG OWNERS") followed by a question designed to build interest ("Do you know what's in your dog's food?") → AIDA+.

Dog Food Ingredient Awareness/Education

HelloFresh

DealBoFAIDA+
$2.9M

Static-Only — Visual-First (no script arc) 22 ads · $38.9M

▾

Static images — the visual IS the persuasion.

Top example beats: [STATIC] HELLO FRESH || LAST CHANCE || $4.99 PER MEAL || CHEAPER THAN GROCERIES
Evidence: Hook is a static image with overlay text and no script progression → Static-Only.

Reference
Field Reliability Guide
TierFieldsUse For
✅ Reliablebrand, spend, visual_format_bucket, voice_type, voice_persona, visual_style, offer_type, metricsEverything
⚠️ Approximatemotivator_primary, expected_reach_primary, concept_typePortfolio counts only
🔄 v2 Improvedsales_formula (now with formula_evidence + formula_beats + formula_confidence)Trust HIGH confidence. Check evidence for edge cases.
